_description: Parameter file connecting ROBIN's original source variables to mwdras_bridge.py. Edit the values below to match your local setup before running mwdras_bridge.py.

robin_source_mapping._note: These keys map 1-to-1 to ROBIN's inject_wm_inner_latent_robin.py argparse arguments and optim_utils.py globals.

robin_root.description: Absolute path to the unmodified robin_official/ directory

model_id.description: HuggingFace model ID for the SD pipeline

wm_path.description: Path to the ROBIN watermark checkpoint (.pt). Contains keys: opt_wm, opt_acond

w_channel.description: Latent channel index where the ring watermark is embedded

w_pattern.description: Watermark pattern type. Use 'ring' for ROBIN ring-pattern

w_mask_shape.description: Shape of the frequency-domain watermark mask

w_up_radius.description: Outer radius of the ring watermark in Fourier space (pixels)

w_low_radius.description: Inner radius of the ring watermark in Fourier space (pixels)

meta_learning_config._note: MWDRAS meta-learner settings. These are passed through mwdras_bridge.py to mwdras_meta_runner.py.

algorithm.description: Meta-learning algorithm. 'fomaml' is the primary method in the paper

global_seed.description: Global random seed for reproducibility. Intentionally simple (123) — seed value complexity does not affect statistical validity; what matters is that the same seed is used across all compared methods for a fair comparison.

split_seed.description: Seed for train/val/test task split. Kept independent from global_seed (456 ≠ 123) so that task-split randomness and image-generation randomness are statistically decoupled.

support_size.description: Number of support samples per class per task

query_size.description: Number of query samples per class per task

k_grid.description: Adaptation step counts to sweep when finding k*

inner_steps.description: FOMAML inner-loop gradient steps during meta-training

meta_batch_size_tasks.description: Number of tasks sampled per outer iteration
